pages.title: Donation Refund Policy
pages.content:
We are grateful for your donation and support of our organization. Donations are normally nonrefundable but if you have made an error in making your donation or change your mind about contributing to our organization please contact us. Refunds are returned using the original method of payment. If you made your donation by credit card, your refund will be credited to that same credit card.

Ongoing support is important to enabling projects to continue their work, so we encourage donors to continue to contribute to projects over time. But if you must cancel your recurring donation, please notify us immediately

Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust is instituting a donation refund policy to ensure fair and transparent processing of requests for refund of donations as digital payments are becoming more frequent.Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust expects that all donors will exercise due care and diligence while making donations. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust also recognises that a donation may be made erroneously or donors may change their mind.

Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust will examine each request for refund of donation and endeavour to make the refund. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust may also seek further information / documents and donor must co-operate in this regard.

However, Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust is not obliged to make refunds and may, in its discretion, decline any requests for refund of donations, particularly if a tax exemption certificate has been issued.

If you would like your donation to Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust to be refunded,

You must request Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust in writing or by email for a refund and Your request must reach Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust within 15 (fifteen) days from the date on which you made the donation i.e. the date on which you:

Made the donation online, electronically or through other means, OR

Handed over the cheque / demand draft to Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust or someone authorised by Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust for this purpose, OR

Despatched the cheque / demand draft to Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust by other means.

The written request stating reason for requesting refund must be sent to the address stated below and must contain all the following details pertaining to the donation: Date of donation

Donation amount

If donation was made through cheque/draft, please provide Cheque/Draft no.

If donation was made through credit card, please provide Credit Card no. (last 4 digits only).

If donation was made online, please provide Donation-ID.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.content:
Our website address is: http://wafatrustindia.org.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, accessible from wafatrustindia.org, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust and how we use it.

If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

This Privacy Policy applies only to our online activities and is valid for visitors to our website with regards to the information that they shared and/or collect in Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust. This policy is not applicable to any information collected offline or via channels other than this website.

By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.

The personal information that you are asked to provide, and the reasons why you are asked to provide it, will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide your personal information.

If you contact us directly, we may receive additional information about you such as your name, email address, phone number, the contents of the message and/or attachments you may send us, and any other information you may choose to provide.

When you register for an Account, we may ask for your contact information, including items such as name, company name, address, email address, and telephone number.

We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:

  • Provide, operate, and maintain our website
  • Improve, personalize, and expand our website
  • Understand and analyze how you use our website
  • Develop new products, services, features, and functionality
  • Communicate with you, either directly or through one of our partners, including for customer service, to provide you with updates and other information relating to the website, and for marketing and promotional purposes
  • Send you emails
  • Find and prevent fraud

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. All hosting companies do this and a part of hosting services' analytics. The information collected by log files include internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, Internet Service Provider (ISP), date and time stamp, referring/exit pages, and possibly the number of clicks. These are not linked to any information that is personally identifiable. The purpose of the information is for analyzing trends, administering the site, tracking users' movement on the website, and gathering demographic information.

Google is one of a third-party vendor on our site. It also uses cookies, known as DART cookies, to serve ads to our site visitors based upon their visit to www.website.com and other sites on the internet. However, visitors may choose to decline the use of DART cookies by visiting the Google ad and content network Privacy Policy at the following URL – https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads

You may consult this list to find the Privacy Policy for each of the advertising partners of Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust.

Third-party ad servers or ad networks uses technologies like cookies, JavaScript, or Web Beacons that are used in their respective advertisements and links that appear on Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, which are sent directly to users' browser. They automatically receive your IP address when this occurs. These technologies are used to measure the effectiveness of their advertising campaigns and/or to personalize the advertising content that you see on websites that you visit.

Note that Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust has no access to or control over these cookies that are used by third-party advertisers.

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust's Privacy Policy does not apply to other advertisers or websites. Thus, we are advising you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information. It may include their practices and instructions about how to opt-out of certain options.

You can choose to disable cookies through your individual browser options. To know more detailed information about cookie management with specific web browsers, it can be found at the browsers' respective websites.

Under the CCPA, among other rights, California consumers have the right to:

Request that a business that collects a consumer's personal data disclose the categories and specific pieces of personal data that a business has collected about consumers.

Request that a business delete any personal data about the consumer that a business has collected.

Request that a business that sells a consumer's personal data, not sell the consumer's personal data.

If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. If you would like to exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

We would like to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following:

The right to access – You have the right to request copies of your personal data. We may charge you a small fee for this service.

The right to rectification – You have the right to request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate. You also have the right to request that we complete the information you believe is incomplete.

The right to erasure – You have the right to request that we erase your personal data, under certain conditions.

The right to restrict processing – You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.

The right to object to processing – You have the right to object to our processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.

The right to data portability – You have the right to request that we transfer the data that we have collected to another organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.

If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. If you would like to exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

Another part of our priority is adding protection for children while using the internet. We encourage parents and guardians to observe, participate in, and/or monitor and guide their online activity.

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust does not knowingly collect any Personal Identifiable Information from children under the age of 13. If you think that your child provided this kind of information on our website, we strongly encourage you to contact us immediately and we will do our best efforts to promptly remove such information from our records.

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Thus, we advise you to review this page periodically for any changes. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. These changes are effective immediately, after they are posted on this page.

If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

pages.title: Terms and Conditions
pages.content:
Terms and Conditions

Welcome to www.wafatrustindia.org (the website) where you may avail facilities provided by Art of Charity Organization, registered under Societies Registration Act, 1860 and having registered office at Gulalta Tehsil Punhana District Nuh Haryana Pin code 122508 and the owner of this website(https://wafatrustindia.org/).

From here onwards in this agreement, the term “Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust” refers to the website https://wafatrustindia.org/ and Art of Charity Organization who owns this website.

This Terms and Conditions of Service (“Agreement”) between Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust and users / registered members of the website (“You”) describes the terms on which Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust offers you the Services (as defined below) through the website. The use of this website is governed by the terms and conditions under this Agreement. Before using this website, you must carefully read, understand, accept and agree to abide by all the terms and conditions under this Agreement. If you do not agree to these terms and conditions under the Agreement, please do not use the website.

Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust reserves the right to revise, amend or modify the policy entailed in this disclaimer at any time and in any manner as it may deem fit. Any change or revision so effected will be posted on the site. It is therefore important that you review these terms regularly to ensure you are updated as to any changes.

1. Description of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust services

The facilities and services provided by Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust are as follows,

1. 1 Funding services: Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust enlists various NGOs and display their funding requirements on the website. Registered members can use facilities of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust to donate to the cause they are interested in.

1.2 Payment Gateway: If you are making donations through the payment gateway, you understand that the payment gateway is provided by a third party and governed by the terms and conditions provided by such third party. You are liable in the event you violate any of the terms and conditions of such third party in making your donations. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust shall not be responsible for any such errors or default in making your donations.

1.3 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust as facilitator: You understand that Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust is merely a facilitator for the donations to reach the NGO(s), who are responsible for the cause to which you have donated. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust shall make every effort to ensure that the donation is utilized for the purpose which is specified in the description.

1.4 Utilization of donations and Feedback reports: Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust strives to provide a feedback report on the utilization of donations made by you within reasonable time limits. The feedback report time period may vary depending on the nature of utilization of donation.

1.5 Tax exemption certificates: You are requested to go through the tax exemption details displayed in the content of every cause before you make the donation. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust will ensure that NGOs registered on the website send applicable tax exemption certificates to you within reasonable time limits.

2. Member Information

2.1 Before making any donation, you are required to register with Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust as a member by filling up all the mandatory information in the membership form. This information will be used for further communication in terms of tax exemption certificates, feedback reports etc. And also note that this is required as per Government of India order to record all the information about the donors.

2.2 You acknowledge that all information on member profile has been entered by or on behalf of you are true to the best of your knowledge. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust shall take reasonable steps to maintain the confidentiality of such information. However, Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust does not assume any liability in case of any direct or indirect loss, injury, claim, liability or damages of any kind whatsoever arising on account of divulgence of such personal information by the visitor.

2.3 By accepting this Agreement, You agree that you are responsible for all information provided and subsequent activities carried by you on the website until you close such account or we terminate your account in accordance with the provisions of this agreement. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust retains the right to suspend or terminate your account without any further notice, due to reasons including but not limited to the following;

a) breach or violate of these Terms or other Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust agreements or guidelines,

b) requests by law enforcement or other government agencies,

c) a request by you,

d) unexpected technical issues or problems or,

e) extended periods of inactivity.

2.5 Termination of your Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust account includes removal of access to all offerings within the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services and may also bar you from further use of the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services. Furthermore, you agree that all terminations shall be made at Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust’s sole discretion and that Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust shall not be liable to neither you nor any third party for any termination of your account or access to the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services.

3. NGO Information

3.1 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust enlists NGOs to be a part of this platform after screening their activities on a best effort basis. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust has the sole discretion to enlist/delist NGOs to avail its services.

3.2 Some of the content on the website is provided by various NGOs that are enlisted. Such content has been reproduced after prior permission from the content owner i.e. NGOs and the copyright of such content will remain exclusively with the NGOs. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust does not assume any responsibility for the mistakes which might appear in such content.

4. Donations

4.1 You can donate to selected causes on Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust using a number of payment methods such as credit or debit cards or cheque. Donations are processed by our payment gateway service provider PhonePe

4.2 All donations made through Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust are NON-REFUNDABLE. Please contact Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust immediately if there are justifying reasons or circumstances for refund and your case may be reviewed on a best effort basis and decision of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust will be final.

4.3 You will receive an email confirming your donation to the cause. This is the final confirmation of your donation. If you have not received please contact Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust immediately.

4.4 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust reserves the right at any time from time to time to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently the donation facility with or without notice.

5. Prohibited Activity

5.1 You agree to act in a responsible and legal manner when using the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services. You shall comply with all applicable laws, regulations and rules and undertake not to use the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services for any unlawful purpose or in a manner which is likely to cause harm or offense any other user including Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust.

5.2 You agree not to post content that is patently offensive and promotes racism, bigotry, hatred or harm of any kind against any group or individual;

5.3 You agree not to create a false identity on the website, impersonate any person or entity (including members of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust) or falsely state or otherwise misrepresent yourself, your name, your age or your affiliation with any person or entity;

5.4 You agree not to submit or transmit through any material that contains viruses or any other computer codes, files or programs that interrupt, destroy or limit the functionality of any computer software or hardware or telecommunications equipment, or otherwise permit the unauthorized use of a computer or computer network;

5.5 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust reserves the right to investigate and take appropriate legal action against anyone who, in Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust’s opinion, violates this provision, including, without limitation, reporting you to appropriate law enforcement authorities.

6. Content

6.1 You are solely responsible for the content that you post on or through any of the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services, and any material or information that you transmit to other users. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust will not liable and does not endorse and has no control over such content.

6.2 All trademarks reproduced in this website, which are not the property of, or licensed to Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust, are acknowledged on the website.

6.3 Through this website links to other websites are provided for your convenience to provide further information and they are not under the control of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust. Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust has no control over the nature, content and availability of those websites.

7. Intellectual property rights

7.1 Unless otherwise stated, Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust or our third parties own the intellectual property rights in the website and material on the website.

7.2 You may view, download for caching purposes only, and print pages from the website for your own personal use, subject to the restrictions set out below and elsewhere in these terms and conditions.

7.3 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust grants you a personal, non-transferable and non-exclusive right and license to use the services; provided that you do not (and do not allow any third party to)

a)Sell, rent or sub-license material from the website;

b)Show any material from the website in public, without accreditation of the source;

c)Reproduce, duplicate, copy or otherwise exploit material on Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust website for a commercial purpose;

d)Edit or otherwise modify any material on the website.

8. Availability

8.1 Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust aspires to be a dynamic website by adding new features and content regularly for the benefit of visitors. For this purpose Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust website may be temporarily shut down for updation work. However, Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust will put its best efforts to minimize the inconvenience caused due to non-availability of website.

8.2 At Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust we make every effort is made to keep the website up and running smoothly. However, Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust takes no responsibility for, and will not be liable for, the website being temporarily unavailable due to issues beyond our control.

9. Indemnification

9.1 By accepting these Terms, you agree to indemnify and otherwise hold harmless Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust, its officers, employees, affiliates and other partners from any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages resulting from the use of the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust Services by you or by those who have access to the service through your account.

10. Privacy and Disclosure

10.1 Use of the Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust services is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these terms by this reference. Without limitation of the terms and conditions set forth in our you understand and agree that Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust may disclose personally identifiable information if required to do so by law or in the good faith belief that such disclosure is necessary to comply with legal process, enforce these terms or protect the rights, property or safety of Wafa Educational and Charitable Trust, its members and the public.

pages.title: Photo Gallery
pages.content: Charity activities are taken place around the world. Start Donating

pages.title: Could farming help solve the climate crisis
pages.content:
The Spring is a passionate and determined group of monthly givers on a mission to end the water crisis in our lifetime. People like you, from more than 100 countries around the world, giving anything they can to prove how unstoppable we are when we work together. Less time collecting water means more time in class. Clean water and proper toilets at school means teenage girls don’t have to stay home for a week out of every month.

We work with local experts and community members to find the best sustainable solution in each place where we work, whether it’s a well, a piped system, a BioSand Filter, or a system for harvesting rainwater. And with every water point we fund, our partners coordinate sanitation and hygiene training, and establish a local Water Committee to help keep water flowing for years to come.

pages.title: Vision
pages.content:
Charity activities are taken place around the world.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, our vision is to create a world where every individual, regardless of their background, has the opportunity to lead a life filled with hope, dignity, and empowerment. We envision a society that is characterized by equality, education, and compassion, where every person's potential is nurtured and where communities thrive in harmony.

We’re here to support poor people Start donating them

pages.title: Mission
pages.content:
Charity activities are taken place around the world.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, our mission is to empower, educate, and uplift communities across our nation through holistic, sustainable, and compassionate initiatives. We are committed to making a meaningful and lasting impact on the lives of the underprivileged, marginalized, and underserved, while promoting equality, education, and overall well-being. Our unwavering dedication to creating positive change stems from a belief in the inherent potential and dignity of every individual. We envision a future where every person has the opportunity to thrive and contribute to the betterment of society

We’re here to support poor people Start donating them

pages.title: Water well for needy place
pages.content:
Water Wells for Needy Communities – A Lifeline of Hope

Access to clean water is a fundamental human right, yet millions of people around the world still struggle to find safe drinking water. In response to this pressing issue, Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust has undertaken the noble mission of constructing water wells in areas where water scarcity is a daily challenge.

These wells serve as more than just a source of clean and safe drinking water—they are a lifeline for entire communities. With every well we build, we bring health, hope, and a brighter future to those who need it most.

Transforming Lives, One Well at a Time

Water is essential for life, but in many underprivileged areas, families are forced to walk miles daily to collect water—often from unsafe sources. Contaminated water leads to diseases, malnutrition, and countless hardships. By providing sustainable water solutions through wells and borewells, we are:

  • Preventing waterborne diseases
  • Reducing the burden on women and children who travel long distances for water
  • Supporting agriculture and livelihoods
  • Strengthening entire communities with a reliable water source

Our Commitment to a Better Future

At Wafa Trust, we believe that every drop counts. Our water well projects are designed to provide long-term relief in the most water-deprived regions. Each well we construct not only quenches thirst but also empowers communities, giving them the resources they need to thrive.

Join Us in Making a Difference

Together, we can change lives. Your support can help bring clean water to those who need it most. Whether through donations, sponsorships, or spreading awareness, you can be a part of this life-saving mission.

In areas where there is severe water scarcity, water is provided to the people through wells and borewells.

pages.title: Masjid/ Madrasa build
pages.content:
Building Mosques, Madrasas and Schools – A Foundation for Faith and Education

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we are committed to constructing and maintaining mosques, Islamic madrasas, and schools that serve as centers of worship, learning, and community development. These institutions play a vital role in nurturing faith, imparting knowledge, and building strong moral character among individuals, especially in economically disadvantaged areas.

Creating Spaces for Worship, Learning, and Growth

Mosques and madrasas are more than just buildings; they are the spiritual and educational lifelines of a community. Our mission is to ensure that every Muslim has access to a place of worship and learning, regardless of their financial situation.

A Holistic Approach to Education

We believe in providing a balanced education that integrates both religious teachings and modern knowledge, empowering students to thrive in all aspects of life. Our madrasas and schools offer:

  • Islamic Studies – Quranic teachings, Hadith, Fiqh, and moral education
  • Academic Excellence – Science, mathematics, languages, and general knowledge
  • Character Building – Leadership, discipline, and ethical values

Uplifting Economically Challenged Communities

In regions where the Muslim population faces economic hardship, we take proactive steps to build and establish mosques, madrasas, and schools. By doing so, we create opportunities for education, employment, and a better future for the community.

Join Us in This Noble Mission

Your support can help us provide places of worship and education to those who need them most. Whether through donations, sponsorships, or spreading awareness, you can play a vital role in shaping a brighter future for the next generation.

Where the Muslim population is economically backward, arrangements are made for the construction and establishment of mosques, Madrasa and School.

pages.title: Wazu khana Build
pages.content:
Building Wazu Khana – Enhancing Spiritual Purity and Worship

A Sacred Space for Ritual Purification

Wazu (ablution) is a fundamental act of spiritual and physical purification in Islam, preparing individuals for Salah (prayer) by cleansing both the body and soul. A well-maintained and accessible Wazu Khana near a mosque ensures that worshippers can perform this essential practice with ease, comfort, and devotion.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we recognize the importance of having clean, well-designed, and hygienic Wazu facilities that allow individuals to prepare for prayer in a peaceful and dignified manner.

Reviving and Supporting Mosques with Proper Facilities

Many mosques, especially older or underserved ones, lack proper ablution areas, making it difficult for worshippers to perform Wudu properly. To address this need, we take the initiative to:

  • Construct new Wazu Khana facilities in mosques where they are needed
  • Renovate and improve existing ablution areas for better hygiene and accessibility
  • Ensure clean water supply and proper drainage systems for a comfortable experience

Fostering a Spiritually Enriched Community

A well-maintained Wazu Khana is more than just a facility—it reflects our commitment to enhancing the spiritual experience of every worshipper. By providing clean and accessible ablution areas, we aim to support individuals in their journey of faith, devotion, and inner purification.

Support the construction of Wazu Khana today—help us create a more spiritually fulfilling prayer experience for all!

pages.title: Quran e Kareem Distribution
pages.content:
Quran e Kareem Distribution – Spreading the Light of Knowledge and Faith

The Holy Qur'an is the ultimate source of guidance, wisdom, and spiritual enlightenment for Muslims around the world. To promote its teaching, recitation, and understanding, Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust undertakes the noble mission of distributing copies of the Qur'an to Madrasas, Maktabs, and individuals in need.

Preserving and Spreading the Message of the Qur'an

Many students and worshippers, especially in economically challenged areas, lack access to a personal copy of the Holy Qur'an. By providing these sacred texts, we aim to:

  • Encourage regular recitation and memorization
  • Support Islamic education in Madrasas and Maktabs
  • Ensure that every believer has access to Allah's divine guidance

A Gift That Enlightens Hearts

Every Qur'an distributed is a means of continuous reward (Sadaqah Jariyah) for both the giver and the recipient. The more people recite, learn, and act upon its teachings, the greater the spiritual blessings for all involved.

Join Us in This Noble Cause

Your support can help bring the light of the Qur'an into the lives of many. Whether through donations, sponsorships, or spreading awareness, you can play a vital role in making the Qur'an accessible to all. Donate today and help us distribute the Holy Qur'an to those who need it most!

In order to popularize the teaching and recitation of the Holy Quran, copies of the Holy Quran are distributed in Madrasas and Maktab.

pages.title: Blankets Winter Distribution
pages.content:
Blanket Distribution – Spreading Warmth, Saving Lives

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that no one should have to endure the harsh winter without proper protection. Our Blanket Winter Distribution Program is a heartfelt initiative dedicated to providing warmth and comfort to those in need during the coldest months of the year.

A Lifeline for the Vulnerable

Winter can be especially brutal for the poor, homeless, and underprivileged families who lack adequate shelter and clothing. To protect them from the freezing temperatures, we distribute warm blankets to those most at risk, ensuring they can survive the winter with dignity.

Our Mission in Action

  • Providing blankets to low-income families, elderly individuals, and children
  • Reaching settlements, slums, and remote areas where aid is scarce
  • Offering warmth, comfort, and hope to those battling the cold

Be a part of this life-saving mission—donate today and help us keep the needy warm!

pages.title: Tricycle Distribution
pages.content:
Tricycle Distribution – Empowering Mobility, Transforming Lives

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that mobility is a fundamental right, not a privilege. Through our Tricycle Distribution Program, we provide specially designed hand-powered tricycles to individuals who are unable to walk due to disabilities, accidents, or age-related challenges. This initiative is a vital step toward independence, dignity, and self-sufficiency for those in need.

Restoring Freedom of Movement

Millions of people face mobility challenges that limit their ability to work, socialize, and lead a fulfilling life. Many cannot afford assistive devices, leaving them dependent on others for even the simplest daily activities. To bridge this gap, we distribute tricycles and mobility aids to empower them with:

  • Independence and self-reliance in daily activities
  • Opportunities for employment and social inclusion
  • A renewed sense of dignity and confidence

Making a Difference – One Tricycle at a Time

So far, we have successfully distributed 55 tricycles to individuals who now experience a newfound freedom in their lives. With your support, we can extend this impact to many more people in need.

Support our Tricycle Distribution Program today and help transform lives!

pages.title: Wheelchair Distribution
pages.content:
Wheelchair Distribution Program

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that mobility is a fundamental human right. Our Wheelchair Distribution Program is a vital initiative aimed at fostering an inclusive and equitable society by providing mobility solutions to those in need.

Our Mission

Millions of people worldwide face mobility challenges due to disabilities, accidents, or age-related issues. Unfortunately, many of them lack the financial means to obtain a wheelchair, limiting their independence and quality of life. Through this program, we strive to bridge this gap and empower individuals with the freedom to move and live with dignity.

Our Commitment

As part of our ongoing efforts, we ensure that wheelchairs are distributed to disabled individuals who need them the most. This initiative is not just about providing mobility aid—it is about restoring hope, confidence, and the ability to engage with society.

By supporting this program, we can transform lives and build a world where everyone has the opportunity to move freely.

For more information or to support our cause, please reach out to us. Together, we can make a difference!

pages.title: Free Food distribution
pages.content:
Food Distribution Program

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that no one should have to endure hunger. At the core of our mission is a deep commitment to nurturing young minds and supporting communities by providing holistic nourishment for both body and soul. Through our Food Distribution Program, we strive to eliminate hunger and ensure that lack of food never becomes a barrier to education, well-being, or a brighter future.

Our Mission

Hunger is one of the most pressing challenges faced by many, especially the underprivileged. Without proper nutrition, children struggle to learn, and families face immense hardships. Our initiative aims to bridge this gap by providing free, nutritious meals to those in need, empowering them to lead healthier, more fulfilling lives.

Our Commitment

Feeding the poor is not just an act of charity—it is a sacred duty and a fundamental part of our mission. By ensuring access to nutritious food, we restore dignity, bring hope, and create opportunities for those who need it the most.

For more information or to support our cause, please reach out to us today. Let's make a lasting impact—one meal at a time.

pages.title: Free distribution of ration kit
pages.content:
Free Distribution of Ration Kit

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we are dedicated to supporting the most vulnerable members of our community, including widows, orphans, and underprivileged families. Through our Ration Kit Distribution Program, we strive to alleviate food insecurity and provide essential sustenance to those in need.

Providing Essential Support

Each ration kit is carefully assembled with staple food items such as rice, lentils, flour, cooking oil, sugar, and other essentials, ensuring that families have access to nutritious meals. By distributing these kits, we offer relief, dignity, and hope to those struggling to meet their basic needs.

Our Commitment to Widows and Orphans

Widows and orphans often face immense financial and emotional hardships, making it difficult to secure even the most basic necessities. As part of our mission, we ensure that deserving households receive free ration kits, helping them overcome daily struggles and focus on building a better future.

For more information or to contribute to this initiative, please reach out to us today. Together, we can make a meaningful impact—one meal at a time.

pages.title: Widows Help
pages.content:
Support for Widows

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we envision a society where widows are not only supported in times of need but also empowered to lead independent and fulfilling lives. We believe that every widow deserves dignity, respect, and opportunities to rebuild their future, free from discrimination and hardship.

Our Mission

Widows often face economic struggles, social stigma, and emotional distress, making it challenging to support themselves and their families. Our goal is to provide not just immediate relief but also long-term empowerment, helping them become self-sufficient and active contributors to their communities.

Our Commitment

As part of our ongoing efforts, we focus on:

  • Providing essential financial and material support to ease their daily struggles
  • Offering skill development programs to help them secure employment or start small businesses
  • Ensuring access to safe housing and basic necessities for those in distress

Supporting widows and relieving their hardships is a vital part of our mission, ensuring that no woman is left behind in her journey toward a better life.

For more information or to contribute to this initiative, please reach out to us today. Together, we can build a more compassionate and inclusive society.

pages.title: Poor Family Help
pages.content:
Supporting Poor Families

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, our mission is rooted in compassion, empowerment, and the unwavering commitment to uplift underprivileged families. We recognize that poverty is more than just financial hardship—it is a cycle that affects generations. That's why our efforts go beyond temporary relief; we focus on creating sustainable solutions that pave the way for a brighter and more secure future.

Our Mission

Breaking the cycle of poverty requires holistic support. We are dedicated to providing:

  • Access to education – empowering children and adults with knowledge and skills
  • Healthcare assistance – ensuring that financial hardship doesn't stand in the way of medical care
  • Basic necessities and financial aid – offering relief to struggling families during difficult times

Our Commitment

Helping poor and needy families is not just an initiative—it is a core ambition of our trust. We strive to provide economic assistance, social support, and opportunities for self-sufficiency, ensuring that families can build stable and dignified lives.

For more information or to contribute to this cause, please reach out to us today. Together, we can make a meaningful impact—one family at a time.

pages.title: Poor Girl marriage help
pages.content:
Marriage Assistance for Underprivileged Girls

Marriage, a significant milestone in life, often becomes a financial burden for poor families, forcing them into crippling debt, selling assets, or sacrificing essential needs. This hardship not only affects their financial stability but also deepens the cycle of poverty, making it even harder for these families to recover.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we understand the challenges faced by underprivileged families when arranging a daughter's marriage. Our mission is to ease this financial strain and ensure that every girl, regardless of her economic background, can marry with dignity and respect.

Our Commitment

In today's era of materialism, the marriage of poor and destitute girls has become an incredibly difficult task. As part of our core objectives, we provide:

  • Financial assistance – to help families cover essential wedding expenses
  • Support with basic necessities – ensuring that marriages take place without financial distress
  • Empowerment programs – to equip girls with skills and opportunities for a stable future

Join Us in Giving Hope

By supporting this initiative, you can make a real difference in the lives of these young women and their families. Whether through donations, volunteering, or spreading awareness, your contribution helps us give these girls a chance at a dignified and secure future.

For more information or to contribute to this cause, please reach out to us today. Together, we can bring hope, happiness, and relief to those in need.

pages.title: House Build
pages.content:
House Construction for the Needy

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that having a safe and secure home is a basic human right, yet many underprivileged families struggle to afford even a modest shelter. For those who lack the financial means to build their own homes, we step in to turn their dreams into reality—with the generous support of compassionate individuals like you.

Our Mission

A home is more than just four walls; it is a place of safety, dignity, and hope. Unfortunately, countless families live in unsafe or inadequate conditions, unable to build a shelter of their own. Through our House Construction Program, we aim to:

  • Provide secure housing for poor and homeless families
  • Ensure dignity and stability for those in need
  • Break the cycle of poverty by offering a strong foundation for a better future

Our Commitment

With the support of philanthropists and well-wishers, we construct homes for families who have nowhere else to turn. These homes provide not just shelter, but also a renewed sense of hope and security for generations to come.

For more information or to contribute to this noble cause, please reach out to us today. Together, we can build homes, restore dignity, and create a brighter future.

pages.title: Maktab Deeniyat
pages.content:
Maktab Deeniyat – Online & Offline

Illuminating Children's Minds with Islamic Knowledge

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that Islamic education is essential for nurturing faith, character, and moral values. Our Maktab Deeniyat program, offered both online and offline, ensures that children receive comprehensive Islamic education, no matter where they are.

Our Mission

In an ever-changing world, it is crucial to preserve and pass on Islamic teachings to the younger generation. Through our Maktab Deeniyat program, we aim to:

  • Teach the Holy Quran with Tajweed, ensuring proper pronunciation and understanding
  • Provide knowledge of Fiqh, Hadith, and Seerat (Islamic history)
  • Instill Islamic ethics, discipline, and moral values in children
  • Make Islamic education accessible to all through both online and offline classes

Online & Offline Learning for Everyone

We recognize the importance of flexibility in education. Our offline classes provide a traditional learning experience, while our online platform allows students to access quality Islamic education from anywhere in the world.

Join Us in Spreading Islamic Knowledge

By supporting Maktab Deeniyat, you are contributing to a future where Islamic teachings continue to guide and inspire. Whether through enrolling your child, donating, or volunteering, your support helps illuminate young minds with the light of Deen.

In order to equip the children of the nation with religious education, the establishment of Maktab is also implemented.

pages.title: Distribution of benches and mats etc
Sewing Machine Distribution
pages.content:
Sewing Machine Distribution – Empowering Women Through Skill & Self-Sufficiency

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that economic independence is key to women's empowerment. Many women, especially in underprivileged communities, face financial struggles due to a lack of opportunities. Through our "Sewing Machine Distribution for Women Empowerment" program, we aim to equip women with the tools they need to build a sustainable livelihood.

Our Mission

  • Provide sewing machines to women, enabling them to earn a livelihood from home
  • Promote financial independence and self-sufficiency
  • Encourage entrepreneurship by enabling women to create and sell textile products
  • Support families by helping women contribute to household income

Our Commitment

By distributing sewing machines, we empower women to break free from financial hardships and build a better future for themselves and their families. This initiative aligns with our goal of fostering self-sufficiency among the women of our nation.

pages.title: Certificate
pages.content:
Charity activities are taken place around the world.

We’re here to support poor people Start donating them

pages.title: Award
pages.content: Charity activities are taken place around the world. Awarded We’re here to support poor people Start donating them

pages.title: Madrasa Anwar e Hira Lilbanat
pages.content:
Charity activities are taken place around the world.

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust. The main purpose of this is to generalize education in every class of the society and it is certain that education is very important for women as well as for men, even a woman's education can be a source of reform and awareness for the whole family. Under the same initiative, the trust has established a Madrasa named Madrasa Anwar e Hira Lilbanat, in which the girls of the nation are taught in an excellent manner Quran Sharif and Urdu theology. Also, orphans and poor girls are taught free of charge, etc., the expenses of such girls are borne by the institution.

But the space of this educational institution is very small and limited. The aim is to move this institution to a wider place and to establish such an institution in which there is a reasonable and convenient system of accommodation, food and education for thousands of girls. Create better forms of completion. Ameen

A sewing center is also being established to make girls skilled. May Allah give him better results? Amen

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust. It is a national, national and charitable institution whose main purpose is to equip young children of the nation with religious and modern education and Islamic morals and to reform beliefs and actions, and to establish an active Maktab.

pages.title: Wafa International School
pages.content:
Charity activities are taken place around the world.

Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust. Has ordered the establishment of such a school, in which there is an Arabic-English medium curriculum and a system of contemporary education from primary to the fifth grade, as well as a complete system of memorization and global education.

I am an expert. On the other hand, I am aware of the requirements of the time, I have expertise in contemporary sciences, and I have the ability to raise the flag of success in every field of life, and I have the ability to motivate every challenge. Allah will start his work very soon

10 + Students 10 Teachers 10 Members 10 + Supports

It's great to hear about your initiative with the Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust to establish a school that offers an Arabic-English medium curriculum along with contemporary education. This can provide valuable opportunities for students to learn and grow in a diverse and globally connected world.

As an expert in contemporary sciences and someone who is motivated to make a positive impact, you have a unique skill set that can contribute significantly to the success of this educational endeavor. It's important to ensure that the school curriculum is well-designed, up-to-date, and adaptable to the changing needs of students and society.

Wafa International School offers a comprehensive Arabic-English medium curriculum from primary to the fifth grade.

The school's commitment to contemporary sciences ensures that students receive an up-to-date and relevant education.

Wafa International School not only focuses on academic excellence but also instills the value of memorization and motivation in its students.

We’re here to support poor people Start donating them

pages.title: Distribution of benches and mats etc
pages.content:
Distribution of Benches and Mats

Creating a Comfortable Learning Environment for Students

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that a conducive learning environment plays a vital role in a student's academic and spiritual growth. However, many mosques, madrasas, maktabs, and schools in underprivileged areas lack proper seating arrangements, making it difficult for students to focus on their education.

Our Mission

Recognizing this urgent need, our Bench and Mat Distribution Program aims to:

  • Provide benches, mats, and Tipaai to educational institutions in need
  • Ensure that students can study in a comfortable and dignified setting
  • Support mosques, madrasas, maktabs, and schools in enhancing their learning infrastructure
  • Promote education by removing physical barriers to learning

Our Commitment

Through this initiative, we strive to equip learning spaces with the necessary seating arrangements, ensuring that students, regardless of their background, have a proper place to sit and study comfortably.

If you know of any mosque, madrasa, maktab, or school in need of benches, mats, or Tipaai, please reach out to us today. Together, we can ensure that no child has to struggle for a proper place to learn.

pages.title: Handpump For Needy Place
pages.content:
Providing Hand Pumps – Bringing Clean Water to Those in Need

Access to clean water is a basic necessity, yet many underprivileged communities struggle with water scarcity. At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we are committed to installing hand pumps in areas where the water level is sufficiently high, ensuring a sustainable and accessible source of clean water for those in need.

Strategic Installation for Maximum Benefit

To serve the most vulnerable populations, we place hand pumps in key locations such as:

  • Near settlements – Providing easy access to clean water for families
  • At intersections and public spaces – Assisting travelers and daily wage workers
  • Along roadsides – Offering relief to those on long journeys

Transforming Lives with Every Drop

By installing hand pumps, we are:

  • Reducing the risk of waterborne diseases
  • Providing a reliable and long-term water solution
  • Easing the burden on women and children who often travel long distances for water
  • Empowering communities with the resources they need to thrive

Join Us in This Life-Changing Mission

Your support and generosity can help bring clean water to those who need it most. Whether through donations or raising awareness, you can be a part of this noble cause. Be a source of hope—help us install more hand pumps today!

Where the water level is somewhat high, hand pumps are installed near settlements, intersections and roads for the poor.

pages.title: Supply of water to the needy through tankers
pages.content:
Supply of Water to the Needy Through Tankers

Access to clean and safe drinking water remains a challenge for millions of people across our nation. In many regions, families endure daily struggles just to secure this basic necessity. Recognizing this urgent need, Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust has launched a Water Supply Program to ensure that no one is left without access to clean water.

Delivering Hope Through Water Tankers

In areas where water scarcity is severe and natural sources are contaminated or unavailable, we deploy a fleet of dedicated water tankers to provide immediate relief. Our efforts focus on:

  • Delivering clean drinking water to water-deprived communities
  • Providing emergency relief during droughts and crises
  • Reaching remote and underserved areas where no other water source exists

Supporting Communities with Essential Water Supply

Some regions lack any usable water source, forcing residents to rely on distant or saline (salt) water sources. To combat this crisis, we transport fresh water via tankers to ensure that these communities have access to a safe and sustainable water supply.

Be a Part of the Solution

Water is life. With your support and generosity, we can expand our efforts and bring clean water to more people in need. Whether through donations, sponsorships, or spreading awareness, you can make a difference in the lives of those struggling for water. Join us in our mission—help us quench the thirst of those in need!

Some communities have no water at all. That is, salty water (salt water) is brought from far away by tankers and delivered to the settlements.

pages.title: Iftar For Ramadan
pages.content:
Iftar for Ramadan

Ramadan is a sacred month of fasting, prayer, and compassion. It's a time to reflect, give back, and stand with the less fortunate.

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we are committed to spreading kindness by providing Iftar meals to those in need during this blessed month.

  • Join us in this noble cause
  • Help us serve 550 Iftars
  • Your support brings smiles and relief to fasting hearts

Contribute Today – Share the Blessings of Ramadan

Providing iftar to needy people in the month of Ramadan is also part of the service of the trust.

pages.title: Scholarship for Higher education
pages.content:
Wafa Scholarship for Higher Education

Empowering Dreams, Transforming Futures

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that education is the key to breaking the cycle of poverty and unlocking a world of opportunities. With a deep commitment to nurturing talent and empowering the underprivileged, we have established the Wafa Scholarship for Higher Education—a program dedicated to helping deserving students access quality education and achieve their academic aspirations.

Our Mission

Higher education should be a right, not a privilege. Unfortunately, many talented students struggle to afford college and university education due to financial constraints. Our scholarship program aims to:

  • Provide financial assistance to deserving students pursuing higher education
  • Encourage academic excellence and career growth
  • Bridge the gap between talent and opportunity
  • Support students in accessing modern education in colleges and universities

Our Commitment

We are dedicated to ensuring that financial limitations do not stand in the way of a student's success. By offering scholarships, we strive to create a future where every aspiring student has the resources to learn, grow, and contribute to society.

Join Us in Changing Lives

Your support can help shape the future of bright young minds. Whether through donations, sponsorships, or spreading awareness, every contribution makes a difference in helping students achieve their dreams.

The work of the trust is also ongoing to get the students associated with modern education in college and university to get higher education.

pages.title: Ustad & Hafiz Sponsor
pages.content:
Ustad & Hafiz Sponsor

Supporting Islamic Education by Sponsoring Teachers

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that Islamic education thrives when dedicated teachers (Ustad) and Hafiz-e-Quran are supported and valued. Ensuring that Madrasas and Maktabs have well-trained educators is essential for preserving and spreading Islamic knowledge.

Our Mission

A strong educational foundation requires qualified and devoted teachers who can guide students in learning the Quran, Hadith, Fiqh, and Islamic values. Through our Ustad & Hafiz Sponsorship Program, we aim to:

  • Provide financial support to teachers in Madrasas and Maktabs
  • Ensure that students receive quality Islamic education
  • Encourage the spread of Quranic knowledge by supporting Huffaz
  • Strengthen the institutions that nurture the next generation of scholars

Our Commitment

With your support, we can help sustain the salaries of teachers, allowing them to dedicate their time and efforts to teaching without financial hardship. By sponsoring an Ustad or Hafiz, you are directly contributing to the preservation and growth of Islamic education.

Be a Part of This Noble Cause

Your sponsorship can change lives by ensuring that Madrasas and Maktabs have the teachers they need. Whether through monthly donations, one-time contributions, or fundraising efforts, your support will help spread the light of knowledge for generations to come.

For more information or to sponsor an Ustad or Hafiz, please reach out to us today. Together, we can strengthen Islamic education and invest in the future of our community.

pages.title: Cash Gift
pages.content:
Cash Assistance Program – Bringing Hope and Relief to Those in Need

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we are committed to uplifting disadvantaged individuals and communities by providing essential support where it is needed most. As part of our mission to foster a more equitable society, we proudly introduce the "Gift of Happiness" initiative—an effort to provide cash assistance to underprivileged individuals and families.

Our Mission

  • Offer direct financial aid to individuals facing economic hardship
  • Support widows, struggling families, and those in urgent need of assistance
  • Provide relief to those affected by unforeseen crises or emergencies
  • Foster a sense of hope, dignity, and positivity in the lives of the less fortunate

Our Commitment

This initiative is not just about giving money—it is about restoring hope, easing burdens, and creating opportunities for a better life. Our cash gifts serve as a lifeline for many individuals, allowing them to cover essential expenses, invest in small businesses, or simply regain stability in times of crisis.

pages.title: Medical Aid
pages.content:
Medical Aid Program – Ensuring Access to Healthcare for Those in Need

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that good health is a basic human right, not a privilege. Unfortunately, millions of people struggle to afford medical care, leaving them vulnerable to untreated illnesses and suffering. Our Medical Aid Program is dedicated to providing financial assistance, medical resources, and life-saving treatments to those who cannot afford them, ensuring that no one is deprived of healthcare due to economic hardship.

Our Mission

Healthcare costs can be overwhelming, and many underprivileged individuals are forced to forgo necessary treatment due to financial constraints. Our initiative aims to:

  • Support low-income patients with medical expenses, including hospital bills and medications
  • Provide assistance for surgeries, treatments, and emergency care
  • Ensure that no one is denied healthcare due to a lack of financial resources
  • Partner with hospitals and medical professionals to extend care to the needy

Our Commitment

Through our Medical Aid Program, we strive to bring hope and healing to the most vulnerable members of society. Whether it's life-saving treatment, diagnostic tests, or chronic disease management, we are committed to ensuring that those in need receive timely medical support.

For more information or to contribute to this life-changing initiative, please reach out to us today. Together, we can heal, uplift, and restore hope to those in need.

pages.title: Small Business Project
pages.content:
Small Business Project – Empowering Communities Through Entrepreneurship

At Wafa Educational & Charitable Trust, we believe that financial independence is the key to breaking the cycle of poverty. Many individuals struggle to find stable employment, leaving them without a reliable source of income. Our Small Business Project is designed to provide aspiring entrepreneurs with financial assistance, training, and resources to help them start and sustain their own businesses. By fostering entrepreneurship, we aim to create long-term economic opportunities and self-reliance within communities.

Our Mission

  • Provide financial aid, mentorship, and guidance to aspiring business owners
  • Empower unemployed individuals to establish sustainable sources of income
  • Encourage self-sufficiency and economic stability within underprivileged communities
  • Create job opportunities and foster local economic growth

Our Commitment

The Small Business Project is more than just financial support—it is about offering hope, confidence, and the ability to build a better future. Whether it's starting a small shop, a home-based business, or investing in essential tools, we equip individuals with the skills and resources they need to thrive.
